title: Multiple-choice cloze
description: Read the text below and decide which answer (A, B, C or D) best fits each gap.

content.text: As scientific interest in sleep continues to grow, researchers are uncovering surprising insights into how rest affects cognitive performance. Early theories (0) sleep as a passive state, but modern studies reveal that the brain remains highly active during the night.||One key discovery is that sleep helps the mind (1) information gathered throughout the day. This process can (2) long‑term memory formation and improve problem‑solving skills. However, not all sleep is equally beneficial. Irregular schedules can (3) the body’s internal clock, making it harder to maintain focus.||Environmental factors also play a crucial role. Exposure to artificial light late at night may (4) the production of melatonin, a hormone essential for healthy sleep cycles. Likewise, high levels of stress can (5) the ability to fall asleep quickly.||To counter these effects, experts recommend establishing routines that (6) relaxation before bedtime. Simple habits such as reading or gentle stretching can help the mind unwind. Ultimately, understanding how sleep interacts with daily behaviour may allow individuals to (7) strategies that support long‑term wellbeing and (8) overall cognitive resilience.

example.explanation: La colocación correcta es “regarded sleep as…”. Las otras no se usan para describir cómo se conceptualiza un estado.

questions.explanation: La expresión es “consolidate information”. Las demás no encajan con el proceso cognitivo descrito.
“Foster long‑term memory formation” es la colocación estándar. Las otras no funcionan con ‘memory formation’.
La expresión es “disrupt the body’s internal clock”. Las demás no encajan semánticamente.
La correcta es “diminish melatonin production”. ‘Hinder’ podría funcionar, pero no es la colocación típica.
“Undermine the ability to fall asleep” es la colocación natural. Las otras no encajan con ‘ability’.
La expresión es “induce relaxation”. Las demás no funcionan con ‘relaxation’.
“Devise strategies” es la colocación estándar. Las otras no encajan con ‘strategies’.
La expresión es “bolster cognitive resilience”. Las demás no funcionan con ‘resilience’.
